scripts.build:css: cleancss -o docs/style.min.css docs/style.css && cleancss -o docs/route-section.min.css docs/route-section.css
scripts.build:js: terser docs/script.js -c -m -o docs/script.min.js && terser docs/route-map.js -c -m -o docs/route-map.min.js
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
